wife and cattle.
Jupiter, Venus & Saturn:-—Leader of the family, having family
happiness, of limited means, enjoys pleasures sparingly, famous,
and approved or honoured by the public.
Jupiter, Mars & Sun:—Very rich, honoured by the people,
learned, free from the fear of enemies and ailments, and having
all kinds of happiness.
Jupiter, Mars & Saturn:—-Mayorof a city, powerful, capable
of enduring hardships, wealthy, jealous and full of self-respect
and valour.
Jupiter, Saturn & Moan:—Fond of women, blessed with
children, happy, friend of sweet-tongued persons, and devoted
to parents, teachers and gods.
Three or more planets joined together in the Lagna, 9th or
10th house, make a person have too many irons in the fire, very
virtuous, very intelligent and enjoy pleasures like Kubera.
If the Moon, Mars & Jupiter occupy together the same Rasi

116 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
except their debilitations and the 6th, 7th, 8th and 12th, one
becomes strong, powerful and wealthy.
